question: Which NLP task types are reported in papers that evaluate their approach with F1-score?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?taskType ?taskTypeLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181003 ?taskTemplate .
  ?taskTemplate orkgp:P181004 ?taskType .
  OPTIONAL { ?taskType rdfs:label ?taskTypeLabel . }
  ?contribution orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P110006 ?metric .
  ?metric rdfs:label ?metricLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?metricLabel)) = LCASE("f1-score"))
}

question: Which data source types are used for datasets whose natural language is English?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?sourceType ?sourceTypeLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?datasetTemplate .
  ?datasetTemplate orkgp:P181022 ?dataTypeTemplate .
  ?dataTypeTemplate orkgp:P181025 ?language .
  ?language rdfs:label ?languageLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?languageLabel)) = LCASE("english"))
  ?datasetTemplate orkgp:P181017 ?sourceTemplate .
  ?sourceTemplate orkgp:P181018 ?sourceType .
  OPTIONAL { ?sourceType rdfs:label ?sourceTypeLabel . }
}

question: Which intercoder reliability metrics are used for contributions whose data source domain is information systems?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?metric ?metricLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annotationTemplate .
  ?annotationTemplate orkgp:P181041 ?agreementTemplate .
  ?agreementTemplate orkgp:P181042 ?metric .
  OPTIONAL { ?metric rdfs:label ?metricLabel . }
  ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?datasetTemplate .
  ?datasetTemplate orkgp:P181017 ?sourceTemplate .
  ?sourceTemplate orkgp:P181020 ?domain .
  ?domain rdfs:label ?domainLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?domainLabel)) = LCASE("information systems"))
}

question: What natural language is reported for datasets that draw on more than one data source?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?languageLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?datasetTemplate .
  ?datasetTemplate orkgp:P181017 ?sourceTemplate .
  ?sourceTemplate orkgp:P181019 ?numSources .
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?numSources) > 1)
  ?datasetTemplate orkgp:P181022 ?dataTypeTemplate .
  ?dataTypeTemplate orkgp:P181025 ?language .
  ?language rdfs:label ?languageLabel .
}

question: What license type is reported for datasets stored on GitHub?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?licenseLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?datasetTemplate .
  ?datasetTemplate orkgp:P181028 ?locationTemplate .
  ?locationTemplate orkgp:P1003 ?url .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?url)), "github"))
  ?datasetTemplate orkgp:license ?licenseTemplate .
  ?licenseTemplate orkgp:P181027 ?license .
  ?license rdfs:label ?licenseLabel .
}

question: What release URL is provided for implemented approaches that include documentation?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?url WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approachTemplate .
  ?approachTemplate orkgp:P41835 ?docType .
  ?contribution orkgp:release ?releaseTemplate .
  ?releaseTemplate orkgp:P1003 ?url .
}

question: What is the measured agreement reported for contributions that apply annotator agreement?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?agreementValue WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annotationTemplate .
  ?annotationTemplate orkgp:P181041 ?agreementTemplate .
  ?agreementTemplate orkgp:P181045 ?agreementValue .
}

question: How many data sources are reported for datasets whose source domain is information systems?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?numSources WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?datasetTemplate .
  ?datasetTemplate orkgp:P181017 ?sourceTemplate .
  ?sourceTemplate orkgp:P181020 ?domain .
  ?domain rdfs:label ?domainLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?domainLabel)) = LCASE("information systems"))
  ?sourceTemplate orkgp:P181019 ?numSources .
}

question: In which year were papers that store their dataset on GitHub published?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?datasetTemplate .
  ?datasetTemplate orkgp:P181028 ?locationTemplate .
  ?locationTemplate orkgp:P1003 ?url .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?url)), "github"))
  ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year .
}

question: In which year was the dataset produced for contributions whose natural language is English?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?productionTime WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?datasetTemplate .
  ?datasetTemplate orkgp:P181022 ?dataTypeTemplate .
  ?dataTypeTemplate orkgp:P181025 ?language .
  ?language rdfs:label ?languageLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?languageLabel)) = LCASE("english"))
  ?datasetTemplate orkgp:P181016 ?productionTime .
}
